productDisplayName: Nike Men Navy Blue Track Pants
description: Style NoteBuilt with the breathability and zero-distraction Fit that athletes demand, these track pants come in a body-friendly design. These high-performance track pants are great for a day out on the field and are designed for Sports. Team them with a T-shirt and trainers.Product DetailsNavy blue trackpants, has an elastic waistband with drawstring, nike swoosh on the left leg, perforation on the side, toggle strap at the hem with a zip on the side extending up to the calfMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and fitRegular fit
